task_completion.description: Open and read the winglet specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/winglet_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Open the eCRM-001 wing model in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is visible with the eCRM-001 model loaded in the 3D workspace.

task_completion.description: Add a new outboard wing section to the Wing component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Geometry Browser or Wing component editor shows a new section added (e.g., an additional section index), and the 3D view shows an extended wing.

task_completion.description: Set the Dihedral, Span, Sweep, and Taper Ratio of the new section to match the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wing component parameter window (Section tab) shows the new section's parameters set to Dihedral=72.0, Span=0.85, Sweep=35.0, and Taper=0.30.

task_completion.description: Save the modified model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in OpenVSP or a terminal command showing the file being saved to ~/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_winglet.vsp3.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenVSP graphical interface (menus, parameter windows) rather than editing the .vsp3 file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The 3D model visually reflects the added winglet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D view in OpenVSP shows an upward-angled tip section (winglet) added to the wing, confirming actual geometry modification.

integrity.description: The model was saved genuinely from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation is performed via OpenVSP's File menu or save dialog, rather than just copying or renaming an existing file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target values required by the winglet specification are: Cant Angle (Dihedral) 72.0, Span 0.85, Sweep 35.0, and Taper Ratio 0.30. The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_winglet.vsp3.
